mapper.sql: image_id, species_cd, individual_id, storage_path, public_url, file_name, content_type, file_size, sort_order, is_primary, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by
( (CAST(#{imageId} AS TEXT) ~ '^[0-9]+$' AND image_id = CAST(#{imageId} AS BIGINT)) OR (NOT (CAST(#{imageId} AS TEXT) ~ '^[0-9]+$') AND storage_path LIKE CONCAT('%', CAST(#{imageId} AS TEXT), '%')) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO individual_image ( image_id, species_cd, individual_id, storage_path, public_url, file_name, content_type, file_size, sort_order, is_primary, created_by ) VALUES ( #{imageId}, #{speciesCd}, #{individualId}, #{storagePath}, #{publicUrl}, #{fileName}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{sortOrder}, #{isPrimary}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE individual_image SET is_primary = TRUE, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE

UPDATE individual_image SET storage_path = #{storagePath}, public_url = #{publicUrl}, file_name = #{fileName}, content_type = #{contentType}, file_size = #{fileSize}, is_primary = #{isPrimary}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE
